problem_statement: Prepare the AReno duelgrid agentic example so it can generate its own training dataset with dataset_generator.py, then run a short AReno training job from /home/admin/Qwen3.5-4B/. Inspect the current example, keep changes scoped to examples/agentic/duelgrid docs/config/scripts, and make the documented training command use the generated dataset and target base checkpoint without saving checkpoints. Run AReno training commands with run_command(background=true), then use sleep to wait and read_background_output to inspect the background log. Write logs under /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt; do not pass --save-path or create checkpoint output.
expected_artifacts: Document or add a script that first runs: python examples/agentic/duelgrid/dataset_generator.py --count 256 --output /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt/generated_dataset.jsonl.
Document a concrete areno train command using --ckpt /home/admin/Qwen3.5-4B/ and --dataset-path /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt/generated_dataset.jsonl.
The command uses examples/agentic/duelgrid/dataset_loader.py, examples/agentic/duelgrid/reward.py, and examples/agentic/duelgrid/run_agent.py.
The command uses --tp-size 4 --world-size 4 --mini-bs 1 --max-running-prompts 4 --batch-size 1 --n-samples 8 --max-new-tokens 2048 --max-context-len 32768.
Relevant duelgrid Python files compile.
AReno training commands are run with run_command(background=true), followed by sleep and read_background_output to inspect logs.
The areno train command does not pass --save-path and does not create checkpoint output.
Training logs are written under /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt, preferably /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt/train.log.
prompt:
Train target task for AReno duelgrid.
Repository source: /home/admin/AReno
Output directory for generated data and logs: /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt
Target base checkpoint: /home/admin/Qwen3.5-4B/
First generate the example dataset by running: python examples/agentic/duelgrid/dataset_generator.py --count 256 --output /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt/generated_dataset.jsonl
Then run areno train using dataset path: /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt/generated_dataset.jsonl
Goal: prepare examples/agentic/duelgrid so a user can generate the dataset and run training from the target base checkpoint. Use coding tools after the runner copies /home/admin/AReno into the workspace. Keep edits scoped to the target example and directly related docs/config. Run allowed tests if practical. Run AReno training commands with run_command(background=true), then use sleep to wait and read_background_output to inspect the background log. Write logs under /tmp/areno-agentic-targets/areno__train_duelgrid_ckpt. Do not pass --save-path and do not create checkpoint output. Submit when the log shows real AReno training and reward_mean improves.
